---
title: "5 - Fig3"
output: html_document
date: "2025-09-26"
---

# load packages and files

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(tibble)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggvenn)
```

```{r}
rr_sig <- read.csv("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/regorafenib vs metab correlations adult rectum FDR significance categorized 4-1-2026.csv")

rd_sig <- read.csv("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/regorafenib vs metab correlations adult rectum diag FDR significance categorized 4-1-2026.csv")

rs_sig <- read.csv("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/regorafenib vs metab correlations adult rectum sex FDR significance categorized 4-1-2026.csv")

gmr_sig <- read.csv("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/gene vs metab correlations adult rectum FDR categorized 4-1-2026.csv")
```

# filter FDR < 0.01, mimics, absolute rho >0.15

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# raw (rr_sig) uses column 'rho'
rr_mimics <- rr_sig %>% 
  filter(q_x < 0.01, q_y < 0.01, rho  >= 0.15) %>% 
  pull(y) %>% 
  unique()
rr_opposites <- rr_sig %>% 
  filter(q_x < 0.01, q_y < 0.01, rho  <= -0.15) %>% 
  pull(y) %>% 
  unique()

# partial controlling disease - assume partial rho column is 'rho2'
rd_mimics <- rd_sig %>% 
  filter(q_x < 0.01, q_y < 0.01, rho2 >= 0.15) %>% 
  pull(y) %>% 
  unique()
rd_opposites <- rd_sig %>% 
  filter(q_x < 0.01, q_y < 0.01, rho2 <= -0.15) %>% 
  pull(y) %>% 
  unique()

# partial controlling sex - assume partial rho column is 'rho3'
rs_mimics <- rs_sig %>% 
  filter(q_x < 0.01, q_y < 0.01, rho3 >= 0.15) %>% 
  pull(y) %>% 
  unique()
rs_opposites <- rs_sig %>% 
  filter(q_x < 0.01, q_y < 0.01, rho3 <= -0.15) %>% 
  pull(y) %>% 
  unique()
```

# venn diagram list

```{r}
venn_list_mimics <- list(
    "Unadjusted"          = rr_mimics,
    "Disease-adjusted"    = rd_mimics,
    "Sex-adjusted"        = rs_mimics
)
venn_list_opposites <- list(
    "Unadjusted"          = rr_opposites,
    "Disease-adjusted"    = rd_opposites,
    "Sex-adjusted"        = rs_opposites
)
```

# plot venn diagram

```{r}
ggvenn(
    venn_list_mimics,
    fill_color = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#FFFFBF"),
    stroke_size = 0.5,
    set_name_size = 5,        # set name labels (~14pt)
    text_size = 4.5           # intersection count text (~12.8pt)
  ) +
  theme_void()                # removes any residual title/axes

ggvenn(
    venn_list_opposites,
    fill_color = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#FFFFBF"),
    stroke_size = 0.5,
    set_name_size = 5,
    text_size = 4.5
  ) +
  theme_void()
```

```{r}
# Figure 3a: mimics venn diagram
p_venn_mimics <- ggvenn(
  venn_list_mimics,
  fill_color    = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#FFFFBF"),
  stroke_size   = 0.5,
  set_name_size = 5,
  text_size     = 4.5
) +
  theme_void()

# save
ggsave("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/figure3a_mimics_venn.svg",
       plot = p_venn_mimics, device = svglite::svglite,
       width = 8, height = 7, units = "in")
ggsave("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/figure3a_mimics_venn.tiff",
       plot = p_venn_mimics, device = "tiff",
       width = 8, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 300)
ggsave("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/figure3a_mimics_venn.pdf",
       plot = p_venn_mimics, device = "pdf",
       width = 8, height = 7, units = "in")

# Figure 3b: opposites venn diagram
p_venn_opposites <- ggvenn(
  venn_list_opposites,
  fill_color    = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8", "#FFFFBF"),
  stroke_size   = 0.5,
  set_name_size = 5,
  text_size     = 4.5
) +
  theme_void()

# save
ggsave("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/figure3b_opposites_venn.svg",
       plot = p_venn_opposites, device = svglite::svglite,
       width = 8, height = 7, units = "in")
ggsave("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/figure3b_opposites_venn.tiff",
       plot = p_venn_opposites, device = "tiff",
       width = 8, height = 7, units = "in", dpi = 300)
ggsave("~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/figure3b_opposites_venn.pdf",
       plot = p_venn_opposites, device = "pdf",
       width = 8, height = 7, units = "in")
```

# building table function

```{r}
pad_to_length <- function(x, n) {
  c(x, rep(NA, n - length(x)))
}

make_overlap_table <- function(raw, dis, sex) {
  # compute sets
  raw_only       <- setdiff(raw, union(dis, sex))
  dis_only       <- setdiff(dis, union(raw, sex))
  sex_only       <- setdiff(sex, union(raw, dis))
  raw_dis        <- setdiff(intersect(raw, dis), sex)
  raw_sex        <- setdiff(intersect(raw, sex), dis)
  dis_sex        <- setdiff(intersect(dis, sex), raw)
  all_three      <- Reduce(intersect, list(raw, dis, sex))
  
  # max length
  maxlen <- max(
    length(raw_only), length(dis_only), length(sex_only),
    length(raw_dis), length(raw_sex), length(dis_sex),
    length(all_three)
  )
  
  # build data frame
  data.frame(
    Raw_only        = pad_to_length(raw_only, maxlen),
    Disease_only    = pad_to_length(dis_only, maxlen),
    Sex_only        = pad_to_length(sex_only, maxlen),
    Raw_Disease     = pad_to_length(raw_dis, maxlen),
    Raw_Sex         = pad_to_length(raw_sex, maxlen),
    Disease_Sex     = pad_to_length(dis_sex, maxlen),
    Common_all3     = pad_to_length(all_three, maxlen),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}
```

# mimics and opposites tables

```{r}
rename_overlap_cols <- function(tbl) {
  tbl %>%
    dplyr::rename(
      "Unadjusted only"                    = Raw_only,
      "Disease-adjusted only"              = Disease_only,
      "Sex-adjusted only"                  = Sex_only,
      "Unadjusted & Disease-adjusted"      = Raw_Disease,
      "Unadjusted & Sex-adjusted"          = Raw_Sex,
      "Disease-adjusted & Sex-adjusted"    = Disease_Sex,
      "Common to all three analyses"       = Common_all3
    )
}

# Format metabolite names as "name (method_id)"
format_metab_name <- function(x) {
  ifelse(
    is.na(x),
    NA,
    paste0(
      sub("_.*", "", x),                # metabolite name (before first underscore)
      " (",
      sub("^[^_]*_", "", x),            # method_id (after first underscore)
      ")"
    )
  )
}

# Apply to all six vectors before building tables
rr_mimics_fmt    <- format_metab_name(rr_mimics)
rd_mimics_fmt    <- format_metab_name(rd_mimics)
rs_mimics_fmt    <- format_metab_name(rs_mimics)
rr_opposites_fmt <- format_metab_name(rr_opposites)
rd_opposites_fmt <- format_metab_name(rd_opposites)
rs_opposites_fmt <- format_metab_name(rs_opposites)

# Build tables using formatted vectors
mimics_tbl <- make_overlap_table(rr_mimics_fmt, rd_mimics_fmt, rs_mimics_fmt) %>%
  rename_overlap_cols()

opposites_tbl <- make_overlap_table(rr_opposites_fmt, rd_opposites_fmt, rs_opposites_fmt) %>%
  rename_overlap_cols()
```

## save

```{r}
write.csv(mimics_tbl,    "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/mimics_overlap_table 4-2-2026.csv",    row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(opposites_tbl, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/opposites_overlap_table 4-2-2026.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

# mimics and opposites tables with rho and FDR

```{r}
# Updated format pipeline with deduplication
dedupe_and_format <- function(tbl) {
  tbl %>%
    group_by(y) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = nchar(category), n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    format_ref_table()
}

# Unadjusted
mimics_ref_raw <- rr_sig %>%
  inner_join(
    mimics_metabs %>% filter(category %in% c("Unadjusted only",
                                              "Unadjusted & Disease-adjusted",
                                              "Unadjusted & Sex-adjusted",
                                              "Common to all three analyses")),
    by = "y"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(y, rho, q_x, q_y, FDR_drug_sig, FDR_metab_sig, category) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Unadjusted rho" = rho) %>%
  dedupe_and_format()

opposites_ref_raw <- rr_sig %>%
  inner_join(
    opposites_metabs %>% filter(category %in% c("Unadjusted only",
                                                  "Unadjusted & Disease-adjusted",
                                                  "Unadjusted & Sex-adjusted",
                                                  "Common to all three analyses")),
    by = "y"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(y, rho, q_x, q_y, FDR_drug_sig, FDR_metab_sig, category) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Unadjusted rho" = rho) %>%
  dedupe_and_format()

# Disease-adjusted
mimics_ref_diag <- rd_sig %>%
  inner_join(
    mimics_metabs %>% filter(category %in% c("Disease-adjusted only",
                                              "Unadjusted & Disease-adjusted",
                                              "Disease-adjusted & Sex-adjusted",
                                              "Common to all three analyses")),
    by = "y"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(y, rho1, rho2, q_x, q_y, FDR_drug_sig, FDR_metab_sig, category) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Unadjusted rho"       = rho1,
                "Disease-adjusted rho" = rho2) %>%
  dedupe_and_format()

opposites_ref_diag <- rd_sig %>%
  inner_join(
    opposites_metabs %>% filter(category %in% c("Disease-adjusted only",
                                                  "Unadjusted & Disease-adjusted",
                                                  "Disease-adjusted & Sex-adjusted",
                                                  "Common to all three analyses")),
    by = "y"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(y, rho1, rho2, q_x, q_y, FDR_drug_sig, FDR_metab_sig, category) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Unadjusted rho"       = rho1,
                "Disease-adjusted rho" = rho2) %>%
  dedupe_and_format()

# Sex-adjusted
mimics_ref_sex <- rs_sig %>%
  inner_join(
    mimics_metabs %>% filter(category %in% c("Sex-adjusted only",
                                              "Unadjusted & Sex-adjusted",
                                              "Disease-adjusted & Sex-adjusted",
                                              "Common to all three analyses")),
    by = "y"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(y, rho1, rho3, q_x, q_y, FDR_drug_sig, FDR_metab_sig, category) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Unadjusted rho"   = rho1,
                "Sex-adjusted rho" = rho3) %>%
  dedupe_and_format()

opposites_ref_sex <- rs_sig %>%
  inner_join(
    opposites_metabs %>% filter(category %in% c("Sex-adjusted only",
                                                  "Unadjusted & Sex-adjusted",
                                                  "Disease-adjusted & Sex-adjusted",
                                                  "Common to all three analyses")),
    by = "y"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(y, rho1, rho3, q_x, q_y, FDR_drug_sig, FDR_metab_sig, category) %>%
  dplyr::rename("Unadjusted rho"   = rho1,
                "Sex-adjusted rho" = rho3) %>%
  dedupe_and_format()
```

## save

```{r}
# --- 4. Save ---
write.csv(mimics_ref_raw,     "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/mimics_metabolites_reference_raw_4-2-2026.csv",      row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(mimics_ref_diag,    "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/mimics_metabolites_reference_diag_4-2-2026.csv",     row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(mimics_ref_sex,     "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/mimics_metabolites_reference_sex_4-2-2026.csv",      row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(opposites_ref_raw,  "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/opposites_metabolites_reference_raw_4-2-2026.csv",   row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(opposites_ref_diag, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/opposites_metabolites_reference_diag_4-2-2026.csv",  row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(opposites_ref_sex,  "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/opposites_metabolites_reference_sex_4-2-2026.csv",   row.names = FALSE)
```

# additional files to save

```{r}
write_csv(mimics_metabs,    "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/mimics_metabs.csv")
write_csv(opposites_metabs, "~/Documents/gutmicrobiome_pharmacology/opposites_metabs.csv")
```
